title: Proof-of-Reserves Field Registry
description: Canonical field definitions reused by Proof-of-Reserves profiles.

network.description: Network or chain identifier (e.g., ETH, BTC, SOL).

address.description: Address or account identifier holding reserves.

balance.description: Balance for the address, encoded as decimal string.

blockHeight.description: Block height or ledger height of the snapshot.

thirdPartyCustodianName.description: Optional third-party custodian name for the address (may be empty).

totalReserveAmount.description: Total reserve quantity for the asset, encoded as decimal string.

merkleRoot.description: Merkle root (hex) committing to liabilities for this snapshot.

liabilityDatasetRef.description: Index pointer to the liabilities dataset in schema.externalDataSources.files.
